no_tournaments_hint:
Create a subfolder in '{dir}/' with the tournament name
  and place your signups file there:
  signups/<tournament-name>/input/signups.csv
main_menu_prompt: What would you like to do?
option_draw: Draw             вЂ“ Draw pairs from signups
option_switch: Switch tournament вЂ“ load a different tournament
not_enough_signups: Not enough signups for {courts} courts ({needed} pairs needed, only {available} possible).

sit_out: {w} women and {m} men will not be included (unlucky).
